Behavior Alterability CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: behavioral symptoms - socially inappropriate/disruptive behavioral symptoms -behavior symptom alterability. 0 = Behavior not present OR behavior easily altered, 1 = Behavior was not easily altered, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
